He started of his career from very early age by performing at PTV Station Lahore when he was only 20 years old. He learned Classical Music from various music teachers including Ustad Ashiq Hussain He then released several Music Albums mainly Folk with Pop infusion following the footsteps of his Father ‘Ashiq Hussain’.

His Famous Songs are: ‘Afsos Beqadr e Lokan ’ also known as ‘Adda Talagang Da’. (Which has also set record on the Youtube for being first Pakistani Music video to have millions of views) ‘’ ‘Nikki Jei Gal Tu Russa Wadain’ ‘Dohray Mahiye ’ ‘Assi Maray Sarkar’ Are just few of many more.

He has also performed in several TV shows not only Folk but also Ghazal, Qawali & Classical Music making a great statement in each style proving that he has a lot more to offer than just Folk. He has performed in several other countries including UK, USA, Europe Australia, Canada & India. He is known as a best live performer All Over

Lyrics:

تیرے انتظار میں
آشِیاں سجاؤں گا
ہوگا یہ مِلن کبھی
خود کو یہ بتاؤں گا

تیرے ہی وِصال سے
دل سکون پائے گا

درد انتظار کا
کیا، کِسے بتاؤں گا

ہو کے تیرے رُوبرو 
حالِ دل سناؤں گا

تب تلک یہ دل تیری

snippet.title: Street Fighter | Official Trailer (2026 Movie)
snippet.description:
FIGHT! Watch the Official Trailer for #StreetFighterMovie, hitting theaters everywhere October 16.  

Set in 1993, estranged Street Fighters Ryu (Andrew Koji) and Ken Masters (Noah Centineo) are thrown back into combat when the mysterious Chun-Li (Callina Liang) recruits them for the next World Warrior Tournament: a brutal clash of fists, fate, and fury. But behind this battle royale lies a deadly conspiracy that forces them to face off against each other and the demons of their past. And if they don’t, it’s GAME OVER!

Helmed by director Kitao Sakurai, Street Fighter is set to bring the battle from the arcade to the big screen with Hadoukens, roundhouses, and all your favorite characters.

snippet.title: Tarzan: Live Action - (2026) | Chris Hemsworth, Amanda Seyfried | Concept Trailer
snippet.description:
#Tarzan #ChrisHemsworth #ConceptTrailer

Watch This Tarzan Live Action Fan-Made Concept Trailer

What if the legendary king of the jungle swung back onto the big screen with Chris Hemsworth embodying the raw power and primal grace of Tarzan? This concept trailer reimagines the classic tale with breathtaking jungle landscapes, visceral action sequences, and a deeply emotional story of a man torn between two worlds. Amanda Seyfried brings new life to Jane Porter while Arnold Schwarzenegger commands the screen in a role that adds unexpected intensity to this wild adventure. Every scene was crafted to honor the timeless legacy while pushing the story into bold new territory.

The storyboard and all visuals in this trailer were personally created by me as a passionate "What If" project exploring a modern Tarzan adaptation. I envisioned Hemsworth channeling the untamed spirit of a man raised among apes, connecting with audiences through both heart and spectacle. From thundering elephant stampedes to intimate moments beneath the jungle canopy, this concept captures the adventure and wonder that made Tarzan an enduring icon. This is my personal love letter to one of fiction's greatest heroes and the incredible cast I dream could bring him to life.

Disclaimer: This is a fan-made concept trailer and a personal "What If" creative project. It is not affiliated with Edgar Rice Burroughs Inc., Warner Bros., Disney, or any official Tarzan production. All storyboard work and visuals were independently created by me for entertainment purposes only.

snippet.title: Avengers: Doomsday - First Trailer "The Last Thunder God" | Chris Hemsworth | 2026
snippet.description:
#Avengers #marvelstudios #robertdowneyjr 

Watch the 'FAN (CONCEPT) Trailer Concept' For Marvel Studios' Avengers: Doomsday (2026) (More Info About This Video Down Below!)


Avengers: Doomsday marks a major escalation in the Marvel universe as a new global and multiversal crisis forces Earth’s mightiest heroes into their most dangerous battle yet. With reality itself beginning to fracture, the emergence of Doctor Doom introduces a threat defined by intelligence, precision, and absolute ambition. The trailer sets a darker tone, showcasing large-scale destruction, collapsing worlds, and heroes struggling to maintain control in an increasingly unstable environment. As new and returning characters come together, the line between survival and defeat becomes thinner than ever.

The story explores a future where power alone may not be enough to stop what is coming, as Doom’s influence spreads through strategy, technology, and manipulation across multiple realities. The Avengers must face not only a powerful enemy, but also the consequences of a universe already pushed to its limits. Alliances are tested, leadership is challenged, and every decision carries weight beyond a single timeline. With massive action sequences, high emotional stakes, and strong crossover potential, Avengers: Doomsday stands as one of Marvel’s most ambitious projects, centered on collapse, resistance, and the fight to protect the future of the multiverse.

Editing, VFX, SFX, Thumbnail by @GalacticTrailerOfficial 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Software I use: Adobe Premiere, After Effects, Photoshop, Adobe Audition, Unreal Engine 5.5
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

◁ On our channel, we create trailer mashups ▷ Trailer mashups, also known as recut trailers, are crafted by gathering various film footage from one or more movies and re-editing them to form a brand-new trailer. These mashups often depict a movie that doesn’t exist or shift the genre of an existing film. As derivative works defined under the United States Copyright Act 17 U.S.C. § 101, they may be protected from copyright claims under the fair use doctrine.

Trailer mashups are not just a form of user-generated digital creativity but also a unique way to build excitement for upcoming releases, complementing official movie trailers. While traditional trailers tease the plot and generate hype, fan-made mashups let the audience put their own cinematic twist on existing footage. This creative freedom can spotlight a particular actor, emphasize a specific storyline, or even transform the film’s genre entirely.

This video is a parody. Due to its derivative and transformative nature, it is protected under Fair Use.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Thank You So Much For Watching!
May the force be with us, Always!

snippet.title: MARHAMI 2.0  | The Song You Loved… Now Deeper | Official Audio • Vibe Chapters
snippet.description:
MARHAMI 2.0 💙 | The Love That Healed Me Again | Official Audio | Vibe Chapters

After the love and support on the original “MARHAMI”,
presenting its next chapter — MARHAMI 2.0.

This is not just a remake…
this is a deeper feeling.

MARHAMI 2.0 is about that same love,
but stronger, calmer, and more real.

Jab pehli baar kisi ne tumhe heal kiya tha,
aur phir tum samjhe —
ye sirf pyaar nahi…
ye sukoon hai.

This version carries more emotions,
more depth,
and a more personal connection.

It’s about finding someone
who doesn’t just love you…
but understands your silence,
heals your past,
and becomes your peace. 💙

If the first song touched your heart,
this one will stay in it.

Close your eyes, feel every beat,
and let MARHAMI 2.0 take you deeper into love. ✨

snippet.title: Islam Zemer - Agahen Armaan (Official Lyric Video)
snippet.description:
Music & Vocals: Islam Zemer
Poet: Ahoog Gull
Composition & Backing Vocals: Rahmin Baloch
English Translation:Badeer Baloch
Creative Adviser: Farooq Baloch
Poster by: Rashid Miandad
Visual Artwork:Saleh Rasheed
Special Thanks:Asim Zaheer



آگھیں ارمانے چم ءِپرشتگیں وابے دلے 
زند راھے دژمنے ءُ مرگ یارے منزلے
A living longing of eyes, a broken dream, a heart;
Life is a path, an enemy; death, a friend, a destination.



تئی نگاھاں بوت کنت کہ سرمچارے پہ وتن
مئے ھیالاں زندگی مئےشوانگے کوھے نلے
In your eyes, it may be a warrior for land;
In mine, my life is a shepherd, a mountain, a flute.



پُر بیت ھورکیں نداراہ کپتگیں کلیگ تئی
گپ تھنا توکل ئیگ انت بس پکارانت ھمبلے
The empty scene will fill up, and so 
will your fallen waterbag;
All it takes is courage—what I need is a friend.



کُدرتاں گوں تاب ءُ پیچاں انچو بتکگ مئے گمان
برپ آپءِ رازدارے آس سبزیں جنگلے
Nature, with all its twists and bends
, has freed our imagination;
Ice, a confidant of water; fire, a green forest.



درچتگ تابان ءُ جنگ ءِ کشکے وت ما گُل گڑا
تیر ءِ ٹپے سینگءَ مئے پاداں براھیت تراولے
We have chosen this twisty path of war, Gul;
Bullets in the chest and blisters on our feet suit us well.

snippet.title: INSIDIOUS: OUT OF THE FURTHER - Official Trailer (4K)
snippet.description:
The Further comes for our world. 
Watch the official trailer for #Insidious: Out Of The Further - exclusively in theatres this August.


Follow us on social: 
https://www.instagram.com/InsidiousMovie   
https://twitter.com/InsidiousMovie  
https://www.facebook.com/InsidiousMovie  

Visit our site: https://insidious.movie 
Subscribe for more exclusive content: https://www.youtube.com/sonypictures 

Having earned over $740 million at the global box office, the Insidious franchise returns with a new family and a terror that redefines what The Further is capable of.
 
In Insidious: Out of the Further, Amelia Eve stars as Gemma, a young mother raising her daughter in the house she grew up in who discovers she can travel into The Further, the purgatorial realm of lost souls at the heart of the Insidious universe. When something evil comes after her, Gemma discovers an ability that changes everything: she doesn’t just enter The Further, she can bring what lives there back to the real world. Once the demons realize her power, our world becomes their playground.
 
With Lin Shaye reprising her iconic role as Elise Rainier and Jacob Chase (Come Play) directing, Insidious: Out of the Further opens August 21, 2026. Screenplay by Jacob Chase. Story by David Leslie Johnson-McGoldrick and Jacob Chase.

snippet.title: Evil Dead Burn | Date Announce Teaser
snippet.description:
Nowhere to hide. 🔥 #EvilDeadBurn only in theaters July 10. Full trailer coming soon.


Evil Dead Burn unleashes the franchise’s most savage and terrifying ride to date, blazing onto big screens with an all-new chapter of carnage and demonic mayhem. After the loss of her husband, a woman seeks solace with her in-laws in their secluded family home. As one by one they are transformed into Deadites—turning the gathering into a family reunion from hell—she comes to discover that the vows she took in life... live on even in death.

Director:  Sébastien Vaniček
Cast:  Souheila Yacoub, Tandi Wright, Hunter Doohan, Luciane Buchanan, Errol Shand, Maude Davey, George Pullar, Greta Van Den Brink
